items.title: Software Engineer Intern

items.description: Contributing to web application development by implementing features and integrating APIs with React and ASP.NET.
details: Developed and implemented new web application features using React, ASP.NET, and REST APIs.
Translated business requirements into clean, scalable, and maintainable code.
Improved system reliability by reducing bugs through testing, code reviews, and timely feature delivery.

items.title: Full Stack Developer Intern

details: Developed responsive front-end interfaces and secure back-end APIs using Next.js and Node.js.
Optimized database interactions and integrated features for improved system performance.
Delivered scalable solutions on time, supporting faster deployment and enhanced user experience.

items.title: Full Stack Developer

details: Built full-stack web applications using modern technologies to support university projects.
Collaborated in an Agile development environment for efficient and iterative delivery.
Contributed to initiatives that give back to the PUPQC community through software solutions.

items.title: Research and Development Officer

items.description: Contributed to a research project focused on applied software solutions.
details: Helped organize events and learning sessions for IT students.
Contribute to the development of Patient Management System (PMS) for PUPQC clinic.
Share knowledge about software development to the members through learning sessions and workshops.
